overview: CUET ELITE AI is a premium luxury EdTech platform for CUET exam preparation featuring 50+ subject-specific mock tests, comprehensive chapter notes, gamification with XP and badges, and an English Mastery section.
features: 50+ full mock tests per subject (250 mock tests total) with 50 questions each and 60-minute timer
Strict subject isolation — no cross-subject questions in any quiz or mock test
Complete CUET syllabus notes for all 5 subjects with formulas, explanations, and examples
5 subjects: English, Business Studies, Accounts, Maths, General Aptitude Test
Gamification: XP system, levels (Beginner to Topper), badges, achievements, daily streaks
English Mastery: vocabulary builder, synonyms/antonyms, phrasal verbs, idioms, daily quizzes
Performance Dashboard with score charts, weak/strong topic analysis, leaderboard
Internet Identity login with personalized profile and quiz history
Dark luxury theme with gold accents, glassmorphism, and smooth animations
